name: bpdashboard
description: - This dashboard analyzes blood pressure readings and separates them into raw trends, volatility, and distribution frequency (called histograms) to give different insights. - It takes raw, intimidating numbers and translates them into easier to understand views of heart health, and behavior over time. - It is currently a SPA utilizing chart.js and vanilla javascript that reads from a .json file fed from a google sheets Apps Script -> GitHub API.
